About the job

Location: Hybrid – 1 day onsite in London

Salary: £60-70k


Looking for a Full Stack Engineer for a Ad-Tech company based in Central London. You will work with a cross-functional teams to deliver new features, improve performance, and ensure the scalability and reliability of their systems


All new backend services are written Golang microservices.


Experience:

  • Experience with Golang
  • Front end experience, ideally with Vue.js and Nuxt.js
  • Experience with RESTful APIs


Benefits:

  • 25 days holiday
  • Healthcare Cash Plan
  • Discounted Gym membership
  • Life/Critical Illness/Dental insurance
  • Table football and table tennis
  • Attractive parental leave


Benefits found in job post
